- 重新设计字幕加载策略：有内置字幕时不加载外部字幕，无内置字幕时自动发现同名字幕文件
- 播放时自动选中字幕轨道，支持首选语言匹配（可区分简繁中文）
- 修复自动播放下一个视频时字幕不加载的问题
- 移除字幕设置中的「记住选择」开关
- 字幕语言选择器新增简体中文和繁体中文独立选项

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Redesign subtitle loading strategy: skip external subtitles when embedded tracks exist, auto-discover same-name subtitle files otherwise
- Auto-select subtitle track on playback with preferred language matching (supports distinguishing Simplified/Traditional Chinese)
- Fix subtitles not loading when auto-playing to the next video
- Remove "Remember selections" toggle from subtitle settings
- Add separate Simplified Chinese and Traditional Chinese options to subtitle language picker

</details>
